AgentBridge Test Page

This page is designed to test all aspects of the AgentBridge extraction pipeline.

Content Extraction Tests

This paragraph should be extracted as semantic content. It contains enough words to pass the minimum length filter and should appear in the structured content output.

Here is a second paragraph with different content. The deduplication filter should keep both since they have different text.

This paragraph should be extracted as semantic content. It contains enough words to pass the minimum length filter and should appear in the structured content output.

Lists Test

  • Token-efficient extraction
  • MCP-compatible output
  • Action mapping
  • Multi-format support
  1. Install the extension
  2. Navigate to a page
  3. Click Extract Page

Table Test

FeatureStatusNotes
ExtractionCompleteAll content types
Action MappingCompleteButtons, forms, links
MCP OutputCompleteFull schema

Code Block Test

const result = await agentBridge.extract();
console.log(result.mcp.resources);
console.log(result.mcp.tools);

Link Test

Visit our GitHub repository for the source code.

Check out the documentation for more details.

Test Results

Click "Run Tests" to validate the extraction pipeline.
